name: us-census
description: Reads configured datasets from the US Census Bureau's API via a caller-supplied query path and query-string qualifier.

risk.read: external US Census Bureau API read of a caller-configured dataset endpoint
risk.approval: none; read-only, no reverse-ETL write surface

conformance.reason: StreamHook-handled (the query stream's real wire shape is a top-level JSON array-of-arrays -- a header row of caller-driven field names followed by data rows -- which has no declarative records/schema equivalent since the field set is a function of the caller's own query_path/query_params 'get=' qualifier, not a fixed schema); hook-covered, proven live by internal/connectors/hooks/us-census/hooks_test.go, mirroring monday's identical StreamHook skip_dynamic precedent (conventions.md Tier-2 hook table)
